chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-6236 of 2023 Niaz Ahmed Khosa Versus I.G. of Police Sindh & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For orders on Misc. No.29150/23 3. For orders on Misc. No.29151/23 4. For hearing of main case. Dated: 27.05.2024 Mr. M. Rehman Ghous for petitioner. -.-.- Learned counsel for petitioner, on instructions, does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. Judge Judge
